description: Ocean and coastal places experienced from the surface.
locations: A ring of coral and sand circles a shallow lagoon, barely above the waves. Palm trees lean in the wind.
A pillar of stone stands alone in the surf, severed from the cliff by centuries of waves. Birds nest on its flat top.
The sea has eaten through a headland, leaving a bridge of stone over crashing water. The span is narrow and the wind tears through.
A mountain of blue-white ice drifts in the open water, most of its mass hidden below. It groans and cracks as it moves.
